focus: SKILL.md primary workflow self-sufficiency and gross template fidelity

findingDetails.title: Package validator still warns that the primary contract is missing recommended routing sections
findingDetails.evidence: SKILL.md passes validate_document.py --type skill, but package_skill.py --check warns that INTEGRATION POINTS and RELATED RESOURCES are missing; package_skill.py lists those as recommended sections at lines 64-69.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add concise INTEGRATION POINTS and RELATED RESOURCES sections, or update the packager aliases if REFERENCES intentionally supersedes RELATED RESOURCES for this packet.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked primary SKILL.md headings, package validator recommended-section contract, and validation outputs; full reference-path validation deferred to iteration 2.

noveltyJustification: First iteration over an initialized packet; one new non-blocking template-fidelity warning was verified against the packager and validation output.

init_skill.py --path and package_skill.py --check flags verified against argparse
edgeCases: First-run initialization explicitly authorized after missing-packet error
Full reference/path/script validation deferred to iteration 2
Packager warnings are advisory because required validator has zero blocking issues

coverage.iterationScope: primary SKILL.md contract plus README/reference route-map sampling

focus: README/references/assets route-map quality, overflow boundaries, relative paths, and section/script claim fidelity

findingDetails.title: Creation workflow documents an optional --path default that the initializer does not support
findingDetails.evidence: creation_workflow.md says omitting --path creates in the current directory and shows a singular .opencode/skill example; init_skill.py argparse marks --path required.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the default-path sentence, state --path is required, and fix the example to --path .opencode/skills.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared creation_workflow.md command prose against init_skill.py argparse and README/SKILL examples.

findingDetails.title: Reference docs point quick_validate.py at non-existent script locations
findingDetails.evidence: common_pitfalls.md documents .opencode/skills/sk-doc/scripts/quick_validate.py and validation_and_packaging.md lists scripts/quick_validate.py, while the live script is .opencode/skills/sk-doc/shared/scripts/quick_validate.py.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace stale invocations with the shared script path or add a real wrapper at the documented location.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked both quick_validate.py references plus the live shared script location; create-skill local scripts do not contain quick_validate.py.

findingDetails.title: The skill README template's own related-resource links do not resolve
findingDetails.evidence: Active RELATED RESOURCES links to ../readme/readme_template.md and ../../references/skill_creation.md are missing in the bounded link check; neighboring active links resolve.
findingDetails.recommendation: Point links to live create-readme/template locations or remove them from the active related-resource list.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Ran bounded markdown link resolver over README.md, references/**/*.md, and assets/**/*.md; promoted only active package-documentation links, not fenced placeholders.

noveltyJustification: Iteration 2 moved from primary SKILL.md review to reference/asset path fidelity and found three new required fixes; prior active weight was one P2, new weight is three P1 findings.

focus: tool, script, flag, command-example, section-claim, and template-fidelity checks against live scripts/templates

findingDetails.title: README template validation checklist points at a non-existent validator path
findingDetails.evidence: The template checklist publishes python3 .opencode/skills/sk-doc/scripts/validate_document.py <readme> --type readme, but the live validator is under shared/scripts and its help surface exits 0 there.
findingDetails.recommendation: Change the checklist command to python3 .opencode/skills/sk-doc/shared/scripts/validate_document.py <readme> --type readme, or define a compatible wrapper at the documented path.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked live script inventory and validate_document.py --help; no sk-doc/scripts/validate_document.py exists in the verified script roots.

findingDetails.title: Reference docs advertise markdown-document-specialist as an executable validation surface, but no such script exists in the allowed script set
findingDetails.evidence: creation_workflow.md commands markdown-document-specialist extract, while validation_and_packaging.md and overview.md label validation as markdown-document-specialist; live scripts expose extract_structure.py instead.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace command/tool claims with python3 .opencode/skills/sk-doc/shared/scripts/extract_structure.py <path/to/SKILL.md> plus explicit AI/manual qualitative review.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked all live scripts under create-skill/scripts and shared/scripts and ran extract_structure.py --help; no markdown-document-specialist script is present.

noveltyJustification: Iteration 3 verified script help surfaces and found two new P1 executable-claim defects over the five P1/P2 findings already accumulated.

findingDetails.title: SKILL.md template publishes a stale package validator path in its required validation command
findingDetails.evidence: The template tells authors to run python .opencode/skills/sk-doc/scripts/package_skill.py, but live package_skill.py is under create-skill/scripts and supports skill_path, optional output_dir, --check, and --json there.
findingDetails.recommendation: Change the command to python3 .opencode/skills/sk-doc/create-skill/scripts/package_skill.py .opencode/skills/[skill-name] --check or document/add a stable wrapper.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Final grep surfaced the stale active validation command; direct source inspection confirmed the live package_skill.py argparse surface.

noveltyJustification: Final pass added one new P1 over accumulated active weight P0=0/P1=5/P2=1; no P0 found and validation coverage is complete.
